MySynergy

V1 launches

21·06·2026

We are building the website for MySynergy — a company focused on packaging engineering and supplier coordination for tech-firm clients. We run our own work on an agentic workflow, so the website goes up the same way the rest of our work does. The build log below this hero is everything we have shipped along the way.

  • 000

    Days

  • 00

    Hours

  • 00

    Minutes

  • 00

    Seconds

Counting down — Hong Kong time, UTC+8

Build log

2 entries · last updated 29 APR 2026

  • 29 APR 2026

    website

    This page exists because we are building in public

    You found mysynergy.technology — our public face. We are seven weeks out from V1 going live, so for now this is a countdown clock and a build log.

    (Our agents and tooling live at mysynergy.io. Different domain, same company. If you came looking for the agent-facing surfaces — the API path, llms.txt, the MCP server — that is where they are.)

    The countdown above is real. The build log below this card is what we have shipped so far. We would rather show what we are doing than tell you what we plan to do.

    If you are a candidate for the 2026 internship: the application is open. The button at the bottom of this page takes you there.

  • 29 APR 2026

    internship agentic-workflow

    2026 internship programme opens — agentic API path published

    We opened our 2026 internship programme today. Two interns, ninety days, remote in Hong Kong and onsite in Shenzhen.

    The application has both a candidate-facing form and an agent-facing API path documented in /llms.txt. If your AI assistant finds and uses the agent path, your application is reviewed alongside the standard one — discovering the path is itself a positive signal.

    This is the first public expression of how we run our business: agents are the surface, not just the back end.

    Apply →

Recruiting

2026 Internship — Applications open until 15 May

90-day paid programme · Hong Kong remote, Shenzhen onsite · 1 June – 31 August 2026.
